llmResponse.agenda_changes: Two changes announced: (1) Add closed session continuation after item 19 to continue CSEA and RCTA negotiations; (2) Move item 16.1 (Information on Financial Audit Report) to after item 11 (Report Out on Closed Session) instead of its posted position
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do I have a motion to approve? So moved. Second. Maria Cecilia seconds roll call vote.

items.intro_words: To order roll call, please. Trustee wells.
